sequence.title: CORAL — A SUMMER LAUNCH
sequence.script:
CORAL — A SUMMER LAUNCH

INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING

Bright window light pours across a crisp white vanity. SCARLETT, 19, sun-kissed with loose blonde waves, leans toward her microphone in a clean white tank. She lifts a slim coral lipstick from its minimal box, fingers tracing the matte finish. The tube catches the light, a single pop of #D4536D against the neutral palette.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
One shade. One summer.

CLOSE ON LIPS — She glides the color across her mouth, blots once, then smiles. Sunlight hits the fresh coral directly.

EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - CONTINUOUS

Handheld camera trails Scarlett as she steps onto the wide promenade. Wind lifts her hair. Behind her, surfers carve white lines across the blue. She glances back, coral lips vivid against the #F0E6D3 sand and sea.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
Made for the water. Wear it everywhere.

EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - CONTINUOUS

A wave rushes over her bare feet. Scarlett laughs, the sound carried by the breeze. The lipstick tube settles beside the embossed brand mark pressed into the wet sand. Golden-hour warmth kisses the scene while cool shadows define every edge.

MACRO DETAIL — Coral pigment on skin, tiny grains of sand clinging to the tube. Overhead flat lay: lipstick, shell, linen scrap, all arranged on pale board.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
Coral. Fresh. Yours.

SUPER: CORAL. OUT NOW.

The frame holds on the shoreline as another wave smooths the sand, leaving only the bright mark and the open horizon.
sequence.musicPrompt: Instrumental light electronic ambient track with serene uplifting pads and gentle flowing melodies that evoke a fresh breezy coastal morning.
sequence.musicTags: instrumental, ambient, electronic, uplifting, serene, flowing, spacious, minimal

frames.description:
INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING

Bright window light pours across a crisp white vanity. SCARLETT, 19, sun-kissed with loose blonde waves, leans toward her microphone in a clean white tank. She lifts a slim coral lipstick from its minimal box, fingers tracing the matte finish. The tube catches the light, a single pop of #D4536D against the neutral palette.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
One shade. One summer.

CLOSE ON LIPS — She glides the color across her mouth, blots once, then smiles. Sunlight hits the fresh coral directly.
frames.imagePrompt: Cinematic still frame using bright natural window light and modern social-first product photography style with clean editorial energy, SCARLETT wearing clean white tank top leans forward at a crisp white vanity, right hand lifting a slim coral lipstick from its minimal box with poised fingers mid-motion and focused gaze toward the microphone, potential energy in her posture and breath, bright directional sunlight flooding across the neutral white studio interior with minimal background, clean sharp shadows and crisp highlights on matte surfaces, shallow depth of field emphasizing the foreground action against a softly blurred vanity backdrop, eye-level camera angle with subtle handheld energy and true-to-life color grading.
frames.motionPrompt:
Handheld eye-level camera holds steady at the white vanity with subtle natural micro-movement. Scarlett leans in, lifts the slim coral lipstick from its box, glides the color smoothly across her lips, blots once with a tissue, then offers a soft closed-mouth smile as sunlight catches the fresh tone.

Scarlett delivers the line with gentle lip movement and a slight head tilt, gaze directed forward.

Bright window light shifts faintly across matte surfaces while faint dust motes drift through the beam.

frames.imagePrompt: Handheld cinematic shot in the style of modern social-first product photography, SCARLETT wearing clean white tank top steps onto the wide oceanfront promenade with wind lifting her hair and body mid-stride in potential energy as she glances back over her shoulder with coral lips vivid, surfers carving white lines across the deep blue water behind her on the expansive beach, pale sand stretching underfoot with soft morning haze and distant waves, bright natural daylight with crisp directional shadows and airy high-key atmosphere, dynamic trailing camera angle at eye level with shallow depth of field on the figure against the ocean backdrop, fresh sensory editorial energy, 16:9
frames.motionPrompt:
Handheld camera trails Scarlett at eye level as she steps onto the wide oceanfront promenade, body in fluid mid-stride forward motion. Wind lifts her hair while she glances back over her shoulder, coral lips vivid against the bright morning sea. Surfers carve white lines across the deep blue water in the background.

She delivers the line with soft reflective calm, subtle shoulder turn and natural breath as the camera maintains smooth trailing distance.

Pale sand stretches beneath her feet with soft directional shadows, light ocean haze drifting across the frame under bright natural daylight.

frames.imagePrompt: Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy captures SCARLETT wearing clean white tank top standing barefoot on the wet shoreline of Bondi Beach as a gentle wave rushes over her feet, posture mid-laugh with subtle kinetic tension and gaze directed off-camera, the pale sand marked by an embossed imprint near her toes with rolling ocean waves visible behind under an open horizon, bathed in golden-hour warmth that kisses the scene while cool shadows carve every edge and texture, bright natural coastal light creating high-key airy atmosphere with slight directional punch, eye-level angle with shallow depth of field emphasizing tactile foreground details and immersive coastal framing.
frames.motionPrompt: Handheld eye-level camera holds on Scarlett standing barefoot at the shoreline as a gentle wave rushes over her feet. She laughs softly with subtle body sway and head tilt while the lipstick tube settles into the embossed sand mark beside her toes. Camera then tilts down smoothly into a macro detail on coral pigment and clinging grains before rising back to eye-level and locking off on the open horizon. A second wave rolls in and smooths the sand flat.
